label: 01 · What we build

title.text: Software that would've been impossible to build for your budget

lede: Most small businesses don't need another SaaS subscription. They need one well-built internal tool. AI changes what one well-built tool can do.

items.title: Internal apps that replace spreadsheets, manual work, and duct tape
items.description: The dashboards, intake forms, approval workflows, and reporting tools your team actually needs. Built around your process, not a vendor's template.

items.title: Turn PDFs, emails, and contracts into structured data you can query
items.description: Extraction and summarization pipelines that read your documents and pull out what matters. For firms drowning in unstructured paperwork.
bullets: Knowledge base Q&A over your docs

items.title: Assistants, bots, and tools that answer on your behalf — accurately
items.description: Client-facing AI features that cite your sources and stay in their lane. We build the guardrails most vendors skip.
bullets: Support assistants grounded in your docs

items.title: The boring-but-valuable automations that pay for themselves
items.description: The kind of work that shouldn't require a full-time employee anymore. Connecting your existing tools and letting AI handle the judgment calls.
bullets: Multi-system sync with AI in the loop
